description: A half-length portrait of a young man with brown hair, wearing a dark black coat with a high collar over a white shirt. He rests his hands on a reddish-brown surface, possibly a table or portfolio. His expression is calm and pleasant, with a slight hint of a smile. The background is very dark, with a suggestion of drapery to the right. The painting is rendered in warm, muted tones with careful attention to the subject's face and hands.
